title: scabiosa stellata subsp. monspeliensis
intro: Scabiosa stellata subsp. monspeliensis, also known as the mountain scabious, is a flowering plant species belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions and wounds, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Scabiosa stellata subsp. monspeliensis include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, and its flowers are sometimes used in folk medicine to treat various health issues.
